delay_signals.notes: Wants guaranteed rent — Stayful cannot offer this on 1-bed (insufficient margin)

meeting_flow.opening_dynamic: Works abroad, hands-off investor, wants predictable guaranteed income
meeting_flow.closing_moment: Shared projections anyway; Liam not interested — wants guarantee. Abandoned.

questions_asked: Can you guarantee the rental income?
What is the worst month scenario?

conversion_gaps: Product mismatch — guaranteed rent not available on 1-bed. Cannot resolve.
key_pattern: guaranteed_rent_seeker_1bed = pre_qualify_out. 2bed+ may warrant guaranteed rent conversation.
pre_qualify_signal: 'I want guaranteed rent' + 'predictable income' + 'hands off investment' + works abroad + 1-bed
